The General (@GeneralMCNews)

BREAKING: Rep. James Comer says he is no longer pursuing an investigation into Les Wexner over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein’s child trafficking network.



— https://nitter.net/GeneralMCNews/status/2024844464951377970#m

The Epstein Class playbook 101. Fund both sides of the war/policy. Disgraceful. They have no love or loyalty to America. We are simply a vessel for them to exploit for their own enrichment. if we want Americans to have faith in our institutions The Epstein Class must receive the highest punishment of the law imaginable.


Meet Kevin (@realMeetKevin)

🚨 Howard Lutnick's family firm bought up the rights to tariff refunds for 20-30 cents on the dollar after Liberation Day last year.

Today, the Sup

Epstein-Maxxing in the front row is wild 🤷‍♂️

Faces blurred so Comedy Cellar doesn’t get sued.

BTW I am not suicidal. I eat healthy food. The brakes on my Ubers and Subways are in good shape. There are no deep pools of water in my apartment and I’m a pretty good swimmer.

Video
Halftime show was objectively incredible. If you didn’t like it you’re hating or don’t understand fun. They turned a stadium into a house party. An impossible task executed effortlessly. Bravo 👏

Whose career you taking… 50 Cent or Jay Z?

Over the past seven years, our community has opened up an entirely new category.
